# services.libretranslate

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.libretranslate`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.libretranslate.configureNginx` | `boolean` | Configure nginx as a reverse proxy for LibreTranslate. |
| `services.libretranslate.dataDir` | `absolute path` | The data directory. |
| `services.libretranslate.disableWebUI` | `boolean` | Whether to disable the Web UI. |
| `services.libretranslate.domain` | `string` | The domain serving your LibreTranslate instance. Required for configure nginx as a reverse proxy. |
| `services.libretranslate.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable LibreTranslate service. |
| `services.libretranslate.enableApiKeys` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the API keys database. |
| `services.libretranslate.extraArgs` | `attribute set of (null or boolean or string or signed integer or list of (boolean or string or signed integer))` | Extra arguments passed to the LibreTranslate. |
| `services.libretranslate.group` | `string` | Group account under which libretranslate runs. |
| `services.libretranslate.host` | `string` | The address the application should listen on. |
| `services.libretranslate.package` | `package` | The libretranslate package to use. |
| `services.libretranslate.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The the application should listen on. |
| `services.libretranslate.threads` | `null or (positive integer, meaning >0)` | Set number of threads. |
| `services.libretranslate.updateModels` | `boolean` | Update language models at startup |
| `services.libretranslate.user` | `string` | User account under which libretranslate runs. |
